content.en:
"Even with you, the strongest true ancestors, dare to stop me?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable was furious, and one after another sword lights directly knocked the Supreme True Ancestor who was blocking him into the air, and immediately fled from here.

He didn't have time to kill those few Supreme True Ancestors, otherwise the time would drag on a little longer, and the others would chase after him.

He was very angry, and finally luckily obtained a forbidden treasure, but he didn't expect it to be seen by other true ancestors.

He didn't have time to kill those True Ancestors at all, and he fled as soon as possible, but the Forbidden Treasure was different from the Forbidden Strange Things, and it didn't need special identification, so it was easy to recognize.

Thus, he was exposed!

He didn't go to the other True Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect, after all, the True Ancestors in the Heavenly Sword Sect who could help him were the other two Invincible True Ancestors.

But who knows if those two will attack him because of the Forbidden Arcana?

Even if you don't start, just two Invincible True Ancestors won't work!

The value of the Forbidden Arcana is too high to arouse the greed of all the forces, and they will do whatever it takes to snatch the Forbidden Arcana.

Therefore, he had to escape from the Forbidden Ancient Well as soon as possible, and then return to the Heavenly Sword Sect, relying on the Heavenly Sword Sect's heritage to reach other forces.

The Heavenly Sword Sect is an eightfold heavenly force, and even the Ninth Heavenly Force does not dare to rashly attack the Heavenly Sword Sect.

Therefore, he had no hope of surviving only by returning to the Heavenly Sword Sect.

As for handing over the Forbidden Treasure, it is simply impossible!

Having obtained such a forbidden treasure, who is willing to give it up?

Moreover, the Heavenly Sword Sect would not let him give up the Forbidden Treasure.

Although in the future, the Forbidden Arcana is estimated to be taken away by the Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Sword Sect, he can at least use this Forbidden Arcana to improve his strength for a long time, and he can also obtain extremely precious opportunities from the Dao Ancestors in the future.

It can be said that this forbidden treasure is enough for him to shake off all the invincible true ancestors.

It's a pity that he doesn't have time to study this Forbidden Treasure now, and he doesn't know the specific purpose of this Forbidden Treasure.

Escape!

Escape!

Escape!

Changfeng Sword Venerable wanted to fly out of the Forbidden Ancient Well as fast as he could, but if no one stopped him, he would soon be able to fly out of the Forbidden Ancient Well.

But along the way, there were constantly Supreme True Ancestors to stop him.

Rumble!!!!

A powerful aura burst out from the front, coming from an invincible true ancestor.

"Changfeng Sword Venerable, hand over the Forbidden Treasure, you can't take it with you!"

The person who opened his mouth was the invincible true ancestor of the Heavenly Sword Sect, the Wind Sword Venerable.

The Heavenly Sword Sect, like the Heavenly Sword Sect, is an eightfold heavenly force, and it is two major forces that are incompatible, although there are no major wars, but small frictions are continuous.

No matter where they are, as long as they are fighting for treasures, the Heavenly Sword Sect and the Heavenly Sword Sect will inevitably fight because of this.

"Wind Sword Venerable, I can't take the Forbidden Treasure with me, is it possible that you can take the Forbidden Treasure with you?"

"Changfeng Sword Venerable, whether I can take the Forbidden Treasure or not, that's my business, but you don't want to take the Forbidden Treasure away!"

After the Wind Sword Venerable finished speaking, he started to move.

Changfeng Sword Venerable was not afraid, and fought with the other party brazenly.

But after only a few seconds of fighting, the Changfeng Sword Venerable took a hard move from the Wind Sword Venerable, and was knocked away by it, and immediately cast a fugitive treasure in an instant, quickly escaping away and getting rid of the Wind Sword Venerable.

In this way, Changfeng Jianzun encountered all kinds of obstacles and interceptions along the way, experienced battles and fights, and gradually had some injuries on his body.

But in the end, he broke out of the forbidden ancient well.

However.

As soon as he rushed out of the forbidden ancient well, a bunch of True Ancestors attacked and descended, and a wave injured the Changfeng Sword Venerable.

Changfeng Sword Venerable broke out of the encirclement with difficulty, breaking through the siege with blood all the way, just thinking about leaving here.

"Not good!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable's expression changed, and he sensed the aura of an invincible true ancestor, many of whom were old friends, but now they had also attacked him.

Suddenly.

The void behind him cracked, and a large golden hand holding a spear pierced his body fiercely, injuring the Changfeng Sword Venerable at once.

This sneak attack made Changfeng Sword Venerable angry, and he recognized the person's identity.

"Jinyang True Ancestor, you dare to hurt me?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable was furious.

Jin Yang True Ancestor is an invincible True Ancestor of the Great Sun Hall of the Eight Heavens Forces, he has a very good relationship with the other party, he has broken into some forbidden places several times, and has cooperated many times.

Unexpectedly, the other party actually attacked him.

Wow!

The Golden Yang True Ancestor, who was shrouded in golden flames, walked out with a spear in his hand, stared at the Changfeng Sword Venerable and said, "Changfeng Sword Venerable, there is no way, the Forbidden Treasure is too precious, I want it too!

"Get out!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable roared angrily.

He didn't want to talk nonsense with Jinyang True Ancestor anymore, and after slashing at Jinyang True Ancestor with a sword, he prepared to leave.

However, an invincible True Ancestor descended and stopped him.

The Great War is on!

The idea of these Invincible True Ancestors was simple, kill the Changfeng Sword Venerable first, and then snatch the Forbidden Treasure.

As for who can snatch the forbidden treasure, it depends on luck and strength.

Soon.

Ye Tian also came here, but he did not participate in the interception and killing of Changfeng Sword Venerable.

Although he also longed to obtain the Forbidden Treasure, it was useless to participate in it at this time, and it was impossible to snatch the Forbidden Treasure.

In fact, the other Invincible True Ancestors also understood, but there was still a glimmer of hope.

Wow!

General Blood, General Ferris, and General Fengxing also came here, and they didn't make a move.

There are only a few invincible true ancestors who really make a move, but if the Changfeng Sword Venerable really asks those invincible true ancestors, the other true ancestors will definitely block it and will not let the Changfeng Sword Venerable leave.

"I can't escape!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable frowned.

He is now completely suppressed and even seriously injured.

If you continue to fight, I am afraid that you will die.

At this time, he saw the Golden Light Sword Venerable and another Sword Venerable of the Heavenly Sword Sect, the Heaven Slashing Sword Venerable!

"Golden Light Sword Venerable, Sky Slashing Sword Venerable, come and help me!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable said.

The Golden Light Sword Venerable shook his head and said, "Changfeng Sword Venerable, it's not that we don't help you, it's that there are too many Invincible True Ancestors here, once we get involved, other Invincible True Ancestors will definitely do the same!"

"Two guys who are afraid of death!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable was extremely annoyed.

But he also knew very well that if he was in the position of the Golden Light Sword Venerable, he would not make a move.

With the passage of time, the Changfeng Sword Venerable has been hit hard, and it is difficult to hold out for much longer.

At this time, the other invincible true ancestors were also ready to move, once they killed the Changfeng Sword Venerable, as long as they took away the body of the Changfeng Sword Venerable, they would have mastered the forbidden treasure.

"Do it!"

An invincible true ancestor secretly said in his heart.

Even the Bloody General, the Ferris General, and the Wind Star General couldn't help it.

But just as many True Ancestors were about to make a move, a monstrous hand reached out from the void and grabbed the Changfeng Sword Venerable.

And along with this monstrous hand, there are endless Xuanxu Ancient Realm Rule Knives and Rule Chains, which are restraining this monstrous hand layer by layer.

"It's Dao Ancestor!"

Many True Ancestors realized that there was a Dao Ancestor who had made a move, and it was not an ordinary Dao Ancestor at all.

Any invincible true ancestor has the combat power to resist the two Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and it is difficult for the four or five Heavenly Dao Ancestors to recover how powerful their combat power is if they are forcibly born.

Therefore, this Dao Ancestor is at least a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor!

Only the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor was able to suppress the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in a short period of time and exert his powerful strength.

"It's the Heavenly Sword Sect's Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor—Zixu Sword Ancestor!"

The five fingers of the Zixu Sword Ancestor seemed to be the five supreme divine swords, containing the terrifying power of the Dao Ancestor and the aura of the Sword Dao, which made all the invincible True Ancestors change their expressions drastically.

"It's not good, retreat quickly!Zixu Sword Ancestor is a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he can exert a combat power comparable to that of a top-tier Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor within a quarter of an hour!"

No matter how powerful the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor is, the top-level Invincible True Ancestor can only barely exert the combat power of the top-level Twofold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, at best, a certain move can reach the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor level.

But the top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor was too powerful, and it was completely capable of crushing the Invincible True Ancestor.

And the recovery speed of the Invincible True Ancestor is not as good as that of the Dao Ancestor, and the ability to save his life is far inferior to the Dao Ancestor.

A top-tier Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor definitely has the strength to kill any invincible True Ancestor, and if the Zixu Sword Ancestor is willing to pay the price, he can also burst out with the strength of the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

In that case, you can kill a top-notch Invincible True Ancestor in one hit!

Just ask, who would dare to ignore Zixu Sword Venerable's blow?

"Hahaha, Zixu Sword Ancestor is here! I'm safe!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable said excitedly.

However, before he could be taken away by the Zixu Sword Ancestor, a finger the size of a star poked out of the void, and one finger pierced the palm of the Zixu Sword Ancestor.

Immediately, a voice came out—

"Zixu Sword Ancestor, you forcibly came out to snatch the forbidden treasure, it's a bit of a rule breaker!"
